case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BERNIER, LENNY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $775.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BERNIER, LENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERNIER, LENNY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-18-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-13-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS ON DISMISSAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-13-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-12-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNIER, LENNY $454.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $479.50, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
